name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 1 Jun 2021
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This release includes the following enhancements:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Rearranged steps in custom email campaign reports"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Rearranged steps in growth & attrition reports"}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Pre-populated standard content in new footers"}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For more information, read on!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"  "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Enhancements","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Rearranged Steps in Custom Email Campaign Reports","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For ease of creation, the steps for custom email campaign reports are rearranged."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In the updated process:"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"In step 1, you schedule the report and define the delivery details."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"In step 2, you set up the report details (such as name, format, and so on) and report source (campaigns and campaign tags to be included in the report)."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"In step 3, you select the report content (metrics to be part of the report)."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" To learn more about custom email campaign reports and how to create them, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Custom-Email-Campaign-Report","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Custom Email Campaign Report"}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CustomCampaignReportRearrangedSteps.0685g000006wWH8AAM.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/CustomCampaignReportRearrangedSteps.0685g000006wWH8AAM.png","name":"Custom_Campaign_Report_Rearranged_Steps","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":2332,"width":2560}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Rearranged Steps in Growth & Attrition Reports","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Similar to the custom email campaign reports, the steps for growth & attrition reports have been rearranged."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In the updated process:"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"In step 1, you schedule the report and define the delivery details."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"In step 2, you select the lists from which to retrieve the data and the metrics that you want to see in the report."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about growth & attrition reports and how to create them, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Growth-Attrition-Report-Overview","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Growth & Attrition Report: Overview"}]},{"text":" and "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Creating-Growth-and-Attrition-Reports","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Creating Growth & Attrition Reports"}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/GARearrangedSteps.0685g000006wWH3AAM.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/GARearrangedSteps.0685g000006wWH3AAM.png","name":"G&A_Rearranged_Steps","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":2140,"width":3036}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Pre-populated Content for New Footer","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The editor for creating the footer now comes pre-populated with standard content that you can edit as per your needs. The pre-populated content is generated based on the information available in your account. "}]},{"type":"blockquote","children":[{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"Note","bold":true},{"text":": When editing, remember that your footer content must have an address tag {{campaign.address}} and an unsubscribe link tag {{campaign.unsubscribe_link}}, {{campaign.unsubscribe_url}} or {{campaign.one_click_unsub_url}} to comply with the anti-spam legislation."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about custom footers, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Footer-Management","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Footer Management"}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/FooterPrepopulatedContent.0685g000006wWGyAAM.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/FooterPrepopulatedContent.0685g000006wWGyAAM.png","name":"Footer_Prepopulated_Content","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1280,"width":2552}}]}]
